business.name: Grand Prairie Tire & Wheel
business.tagline: Grand Prairie's #1 Tire & Wheel Shop Since 2009

seo.title: Grand Prairie Tire & Wheel | New & Used Tires | Custom Wheels DFW
seo.description: Grand Prairie's trusted tire shop since 2009. New & used tires, custom wheels, TPMS, alignment. Walk-ins welcome. Serving Arlington, Irving, Dallas. Call (972) 555-0144.
keywords: tire shop near me Grand Prairie

hero.headline: Grand Prairie's Trusted Tire & Wheel Experts
hero.subheadline: New tires, used tires, custom wheels, and TPMS service. Walk-ins welcome — no appointment needed for most services.

services.name: New Tire Sales & Installation
services.desc: All major brands in stock — Michelin, Goodyear, BF Goodrich, Cooper, Nexen, and more. Same-day mounting and balancing.

services.name: Used Tires
services.desc: Quality used tires inspected and guaranteed. Great option for budget-conscious drivers. All sizes available.

services.name: Custom Wheels & Rims
services.desc: Hundreds of styles in stock. We'll help you find the perfect fit for your vehicle. Financing available.

services.name: TPMS Service
services.desc: Tire Pressure Monitoring System sensor replacement, programming, and reset. Fast in-and-out service.

services.name: Wheel Alignment
services.desc: 4-wheel computerized alignment. Extends tire life and improves fuel economy. Most vehicles done in under 1 hour.

services.name: Tire Rotation & Balance
services.desc: Extend your tire life and get a smoother ride. Recommended every 5,000–7,500 miles.

items.author: Marcus T.
items.text: Best tire shop in Grand Prairie, hands down. Got 4 new tires mounted and balanced in under an hour. Price was way better than Discount Tire. I'm a customer for life.

items.author: Rosa M.
items.text: They had my tire size in stock and got me in and out in 30 minutes. The guys were super honest about what I needed vs. what I didn't. No upselling, just good service.

items.author: David K.
items.text: Custom wheels look amazing on my truck. They helped me pick the right offset and size. Very knowledgeable staff. Already recommended to 3 friends.

items.author: Sarah L.
items.text: Good prices on used tires. They were honest that one I wanted wasn't in great shape and suggested a better one. Appreciated the integrity.

faq.a: No appointment needed for tire installation, rotation, or TPMS service. We take walk-ins Monday–Saturday. Wheel alignments may require a short wait during busy hours.

faq.q: What tire brands do you carry?
faq.a: We stock Michelin, Goodyear, BF Goodrich, Cooper, Nexen, Falken, Hankook, and more. We can order any brand not in stock — usually arrives next business day.
Yes, we buy used tires and wheels in good condition. Bring them in and we'll make you an offer.
Yes, we offer financing on custom wheel packages. Ask us about 6-month same-as-cash options.

faq.q: How long does a tire installation take?
faq.a: Most single tire installations take 15–30 minutes. A full set of 4 tires with mounting and balancing is typically done in 45–60 minutes.
Yes, we service light trucks, vans, and commercial vehicles. Call ahead for commercial appointments.
